comment: hippo: the first well-fed run. w010's winning config (label_loss_w 0.1, the 19 Jul reassessment victor) on 100k unique images x 40 epochs - swapping repetition for fresh data at similar compute after every 10k model showed the same memorisation gap. 100k at 256px cannot cache_ram on a 60GB pod, so the dataloader gets workers instead; the recipe's other levers apply via --from-bench.
